brief: Today's news highlights tensions over immigration enforcement, trade secret lawsuits, and environmental deregulation, while research explores AI in crime analysis, missing data visualization, and brain-computer interfaces.
news_summary: Trump promotes discounted gas while his administration faces backlash over an ICE shooting and habitat protections rollback; Apple sues OpenAI for alleged trade secret theft.
papers_summary: New visualization tools address missing data imputation and compositional analysis of Chinese paintings, while studies investigate AI's role in crime linkage and brain-computer interfaces.

en.brief: Today's news highlights tensions over immigration enforcement, trade secret lawsuits, and environmental deregulation, while research explores AI in crime analysis, missing data visualization, and brain-computer interfaces.
en.news_summary: Trump promotes discounted gas while his administration faces backlash over an ICE shooting and habitat protections rollback; Apple sues OpenAI for alleged trade secret theft.
en.papers_summary: New visualization tools address missing data imputation and compositional analysis of Chinese paintings, while studies investigate AI's role in crime linkage and brain-computer interfaces.

zh.brief: 今日中文新闻聚焦福建鞋厂火灾致28人死亡、美伊冲突升级、台风巴威逼近台湾，以及新加坡夫妇收养疑遭贩卖男婴案。研究方面涵盖可视化、AI与犯罪分析等。
zh.news_summary: 福建泉州晋江鞋厂大火造成28人遇难，习近平指示严肃追责；美伊互相发动攻击，哈梅内伊下葬之际冲突加剧；台风巴威靠近台湾，多地停班停课；新加坡夫妇收养印尼男婴涉人口贩卖引发关注。
zh.papers_summary: arXiv论文涉及缺失数据诊断、犯罪关联分析、脑机接口临床试验、中国画可视化等研究方向。

todays_image.caption: A century-old telegram sent during World War I and a modern political pitch for "Freedom Fuel" both use wartime rhetoric to frame energy as a national security issue.
todays_image.title: Telegram to John Jordan, September 5, 1918
